nodes.name: Webhook Call Handler
nodes.notes: Receives tool invocations from ElevenLabs during live calls.

nodes.name: Code Normalize
nodes.notes: Flattens ElevenLabs body and extracts tool_name.

nodes.name: IF check_availability
nodes.notes: True → check_availability branch. False → next IF.

nodes.name: IF record_outcome
nodes.notes: True → record_outcome branch. False → next IF.

nodes.name: IF get_schedule_overview
nodes.notes: True → schedule overview branch. False → unsupported.

nodes.name: Code Check Availability
nodes.notes: Returns free slots filtered by doctor and/or day.

nodes.name: Code Format Outcome
nodes.notes: Normalizes outcome payload for analysis workflow.

nodes.name: Code Schedule Overview
nodes.notes: Returns doctor list with specialties and days.

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('[Unsupported] tool_name=' + $json.tool_name);
return [{ json: { success: false, error: 'Unsupported tool_name: ' + ($json.tool_name || 'none') } }];

nodes.name: HTTP Trigger Analysis
nodes.notes: Forwards normalized call payload to analysis webhook.
